== Notes for [[Item:Q100512|Q100512]] ==

The family surname is De Saporta (or variant thereof); over time the first name of Benveniste has been applied as the surname of the lineage, see: https://www.academia.edu/7867357/El_testamento_de_Benvenist_de_Saporta_1268_

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD8AB2AC1EFBBFA9822EF79916CB77F
geni:6000000112947277028

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
